PEB_5AGen2_v3.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 75A
Recv ID: 77E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 68
Func Name: PEB

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "GP7",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 4

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
